course: Data Fundamentals — Data Visualizations and Power BI

modules.name: Introduction to Data Visualizations
modules.description: Create effective data visualizations, apply design principles, analyze stakeholders, interpret infographics, and explore dashboards.

lessons.title: Intro to Data Visualizations
topics: Purpose and importance of data visualization
Choosing the right visual for your data

lessons.title: Design Principles
topics: Basic design principles for data presentations

modules.name: Introduction to Power BI
modules.description: Get started with Power BI, create reports, and use Quick Insights to explore data.

lessons.title: Power BI Quick Insights
topics: Using Quick Insights to discover patterns

modules.name: Slicers, Groups, and Bins
modules.description: Sort and filter data with slicers, organize data using groups and bins.

modules.name: Visualizations and Dashboards
modules.description: Customize visualizations and build interactive dashboards in Power BI.

modules.name: Excel and Power BI
modules.description: Extract, transform, and load data from Excel into Power BI.

modules.name: Working with Census Data in Power BI
modules.description: Work with large real-world datasets using U.S. Census data in Power BI.

modules.name: Excel Workbooks and Power BI
modules.description: Publish Excel workbooks to Power BI for sharing and collaboration.

lessons.title: Publishing Excel Workbooks to Power BI

assessment.title: Summative Assessment: Data Analysis with Power BI
items: Learner key parts one and three
Instructor key parts two and four
